---
name: Bounty Submission
about: Submit work for a specific bounty issue
title: '[BOUNTY SUBMISSION]: '
labels: submission
assignees: ''

---

## Bounty Context
- **Bounty Issue**: # (link the original CON-xxx issue)
- **Repo Surface**: (e.g., conxius-wallet, lib-conxian-core)

## Delivery Evidence
Please provide links to the implementation artifacts:
- **Pull Request**: (link to the PR containing the fix)
- **Commit SHA**: (if already merged to dev)
- **Verification Logs**: (attach test outputs or audit reports)

## Acceptance Criteria Check
Referencing the original issue's acceptance criteria:
- [ ] Criteria 1: ...
- [ ] Criteria 2: ...

## Maintainer Verification
- [ ] Implementation satisfies the "Sovereign-First" mandate.
- [ ] No PII or secrets leaked in submission.
- [ ] CI checks passing on the target branch.
